sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `useAssetManagement` is now a separate hook containing `registerGenerationAsset`, `uploadImageGeneration`, and `handleAssetDrop`. It has no DOM manipulation or coordinator dependency (`rg -n "document\\.|window\\.|querySelector|classList|coordinator|dragOver|DropIndicator|requestAnimationFrame" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts` returns no hits), and all dependencies needed by the extracted callbacks are passed through its args, including the selection/project state they currently rely on.
